overall.description: First-person perspective walking along a dirt trail at night in a video game environment. The scene is illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp, revealing tall grass and trees lining the path through a dark forest.

segments.scene_description: A continuous first-person walk along a narrow dirt trail through a dark forest at night. The path is flanked by dense tall grass on both sides, illuminated by a flashlight that reveals the uneven ground ahead. A large tree looms on the left side as the camera progresses steadily forward through the quiet, empty woodland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow dirt trail that cuts through the oppressive darkness of a nocturnal forest. It begins with a steady forward movement, where a flashlight beam carves a path through the gloom to reveal the uneven ground of the trail. As the camera progresses, the light sweeps across dense tall grass flanking both sides of the path, emphasizing the isolation of the woodland. The scene then shifts as a large, looming tree emerges from the shadows on the left, momentarily dominating the frame before the camera continues its quiet advance deeper into the empty forest.
